title: Rules of ordinary proceeding applicable
doc_html:
Art. 4662.  Rules of ordinary proceeding applicable

Except as otherwise provided in this Title and by law, the rules applicable to an ordinary proceeding apply, so far as practicable, to a concursus proceeding.
doc_text:
Art. 4662.  Rules of ordinary proceeding applicable
Except as otherwise provided in this Title and by law, the rules applicable to an ordinary proceeding apply, so far as practicable, to a concursus proceeding.
